book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should serve indian food and should be in the east
The restaurant should be in the moderate price range
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 8 people at 12:15 on friday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of guesthouse and doesn't need to include internet
The hotel should include free parking
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has free wifi
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for the same group of people and 2 nights starting from the same day
If the booking fails how about saturday
Make sure you get the reference number
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time
Make sure you get contact number and car type
